name: Company Peasin' Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Kraft Miracle Whip Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked potato slices, celery, chopped hard-boiled eggs, sliced green onions, and chopped pimentos in a large bowl.
2. Add salt and salad dressing to the mixture.
3. Mix lightly until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Makes 6 servings.
